chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. A. No.S-133 of 2019. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of M.A No.1048/19. 29.07.2019 Mr. Umran Khan Yousifzai Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi Addl.PG along with Inspector Ghulam Hyder Brohi SHO P.S Kot diji and SIP Nasrullah on behalf of SSP Khairpur. ******** With reference to the order of previous date, SSP Khairpur files statement stating therein that DSP and SHO Police Station, Kotdiji have been warned to take all efforts to recover alleged minor detainees and produced them before this Court. The SHO Police Station, Kotdiji present in Court files statement wherein it has been mentioned that respondents No.5 to 7 have been shifted from place mentioned in the application therefore, they could not produce the alleged detainees despite their efforts. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of applicant draws attention of this Court towards previous orders when the counsel for the respondents No.5 to 7 appeared before this Court and made statement. Today neither counsel for respondents No.5 to 7 is in attendance despite his name appearing in the cause list nor respondents No.5 to 7 are in attendance. As an indulgence and as a last chance this matter is being adjourned with note of caution that in the event if respondent No.5 to 7 and or their counsel failed to appear before this Court, stern action which may include issuance of warrants of arrest will be taken against them. SHO concerned present in Court is further directed to make hectic efforts to produce alleged detainees before this Court.

As an indulgence and as a last chance this matter is being adjourned with note of caution that in the event if respondent No.5 to 7 and or their counsel failed to appear before this Court, stern action which may include issuance of warrants of arrest will be taken against them. SHO concerned present in Court is further directed to make hectic efforts to produce alleged detainees before this Court. In this regard applicant is directed to co-operate/accompany with the concerned SHO and point out the place where the respondents No.5 to 7 are presently residing. From the record it also appears that on 08.07.2019 Mr. Ghulam Asghar Abbasi also superseded the earlier counsel on behalf of respondent No.5 to 7. Office is directed to ensure the name of Mr. Ghulam Asghar Abbasi shall appear in the cause list in future. Office is also directed to delete the name of earlier counsel Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi from the file cover. To come-up on 16.08.2019. Let intimation notice be issued to learned counsel for private respondents for the next date. J U D G E Ihsan.
